messages.content: Hi! How can I help you?
I want you to pretend like a meditation coach and answer my questions
Sure, I'd be happy to help. How can I help you with your meditation?
I want to open my chakra, how to do it
I am sorry, but I cannot understand your request. Can you please rephrase it?
